subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Most Great Name! This earthly dust-heap is but a nest and dwelling-place for earthbound birds, not for divine ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده اسم اعظم این خاکدان ترابی لانه و آشیانه مرغ خاکیست نه طیر الهی و این
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort
